mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS homeworkId, h.title AS title, h.activity_tag AS activityTag, h.deadline AS deadline, h.total_score AS totalScore, -- 已批改数：status = 2 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gradedCount, -- 待批改数：status = 1 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ungradedCount, -- 未提交数：status = 0 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unsubmittedCount FROM homework h -- LEFT JOIN 保证即使这门课还没有任何提交记录，作业行也能出现在结果里 LEFT JOIN homework_submit hs ON hs.homework_id = h.id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY h.id, h.title, h.activity_tag, h.deadline, h.total_score -- 按发布时间倒序：最新作业在最上面（与 B_homework.md 列表约定一致） ORDER BY h.publish_time DESC, h.id DESC
